scope: Temporary strict-v1 fixtures only; no active corpus source root, planner behavior, or promotion status changed.
changes: FF, GBFS, and IW validated concrete candidates render through the existing PDDL, cache, VFG, PNG, and semantic-image gates.
search_traversal_<split>.jsonl is a separately persisted, closed-schema record family with frozen pair, event, state, trace, and render provenance.
Graphplan raw layers remain nonvisual; they do not produce search_traversal records.
FF successor reconstruction is forbidden when recorded successor atoms are absent.
Planimation output roots equal to or nested under a selected source root are rejected before writing.

verification.pytest: 66 passed in 6.29s: pairing, search-traversal, state-projection, release-verifier, and rollout-gate fixtures.
verification.release_cli: fixture release succeeded with one pair, four state-render rows, one train full record, one train step record, and two train search-traversal records.

active_corpus_status: Blocked: active source rows lack phase3_traversal_trace_v1 and were not modified or promoted.
